scripts.dev: yarn setup-env && dotenvx run --overload -f .env.server -- yarn dev:no-env
scripts.build: yarn workspace @ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash/client build && yarn workspace @ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash/server build
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash/client lint && yarn workspace @ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash/server lint
scripts.docker:build-for-publish: podman build . -t ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash:latest --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT=production && podman save -o image.tar ts-private-takeda-gxp-dev-data-app-sql-tetra-viz-dash:latest
